title: Charred Creamy Slovakian Salmon Bowl
description: A hearty post-workout dish featuring hot smoked flaked salmon, braise, and dairy-free friendly ingredients, inspired by Slovakian cuisine.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the chopped onion, garlic, carrots, and potatoes with olive oil, salt, and black pepper until they are evenly coated.
Spread the vegetables on a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 20 minutes.
While the vegetables are roasting, mix the non-dairy yogurt and lemon juice in a small bowl.
After the vegetables have roasted for 20 minutes, remove them from the oven and stir in the flaked hot smoked salmon.
Return the baking sheet to the oven and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Remove the baking sheet from the oven and stir in the yogurt and lemon juice mixture.
Divide the salmon and vegetable mixture into four bowls and serve hot.
